name: Recall Fact
description: Searches the user's personal knowledge base for previously-saved facts. Use this when the user asks about themselves, their accounts, their preferences, their tools, or anything else they may have shared in a prior conversation. Returns matching lines grouped by topic file. If no matches are found, tell the user nothing has been saved on that topic yet. Required: query (a keyword or short phrase to search for, e.g., 'ally savings', 'manon allergies', 'dewalt planer').
author: Michael

query.description: A keyword or short phrase to search the knowledge base for (case-insensitive substring match). Use the most distinctive word or two from what you're looking for. Examples: 'ally', 'emergency fund', 'shellfish', 'planer'. Required.
